attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
ST.TRANSACTION_ID ,
ST.APPLICATION_NAME ,
ST.APPLICATION_ID ,
ST.LEDGER_ID      ,
ST.ORG_ID         ,
ST.TRX_CLASS  ,
ST.ORDER_LINE_ID  ,
ST.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
ST.TRX_NUMBER    ,
ST.TRX_DATE       ,
ST.TRX_LINE_ID    ,
ST.TRX_LINE_NUM   ,
ST.TRANSACTION_SOURCE,
ST.AMOUNT,
ST.QUANTITY_INVOICED  AS ORDER_QUANTITY,
ST.CURRENCY_CODE,
ST.PROCESS_STATUS,
ST.HEADER_ID,
ST.ORDER_NUMBER,
ST.ELEMENT_TYPE   ,
ST.RULE_START_DATE,
ST.RULE_END_DATE  ,
ST.ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION ,
ST.ATTRIBUTE1 ,
ST.ATTRIBUTE2 ,
ST.ATTRIBUTE3 ,
ST.ATTRIBUTE4 ,
ST.ATTRIBUTE5 ,
ST.ATTRIBUTE6 ,
ST.SKU,
ST.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME   ,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
ST.ATTRIBUTE11, 
ST.ATTRIBUTE12, 
ST.ATTRIBUTE13, 
ST.ATTRIBUTE9,
ST.ATTRIBUTE16,
ST.ATTRIBUTE20,
ST.ATTRIBUTE21,
ST.ATTRIBUTE23,
ST.ATTRIBUTE28,
COALESCE(case when ST.APPLICATION_NAME='Cisco Partner Incentives' then st.Attribute4 else ST.ATTRIBUTE7 end,'UNKNOWN') AS REBATE_APPLIED_METHOD_CD
,COALESCE(case when ST.APPLICATION_NAME='Cisco Partner Incentives' then st.attribute7 else ST.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID end,'UNKNOWN') AS SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID
,ST.ATTRIBUTE39
,COALESCE(ST.NUM_ATTRIBUTE51,-999) /**Anusha: TnC POS data inclusion in below UNION ALL**/
,ST.ATTRIBUTE8 AS ATTRIBUTE8
,ST.NUM_ATTRIBUTE53
FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG_XXCFIR_REV_EXTRACT_VIP  ST
WHERE  NOT EXISTS (
SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REV_EXTRACT_VIP  EL
WHERE
EL.TRANSACTION_ID= ST.TRANSACTION_ID
AND EL.APPLICATION_ID = ST.APPLICATION_ID)
